description.p: Sticky Notes is a spatial canvas for organizing sticky notes into folders. Pan, zoom, and drop notes wherever they feel right on an infinite workspace. Link two notes together and the connection shows up as a dashed arrow on the canvas.

ul.li: Infinite pan-and-zoom canvas — your whole desk, at a glance
Folders with colored badges, per-folder note counts, and a drawer that gets out of the way
Three themes — Paper, Flat, and Terminal — for whatever mood the notes session is in
Markdown bodies, link arrows between notes, color-coded folder badges
Pinned notes that follow you into every folder
Plain JSON storage you can read with cat, sync with rsync, or version with git
Import and export your notes as JSON
Keyboard shortcuts for the common actions, drag-and-drop for everything else

description.p: What it does not do: cloud sync, real-time collaboration, push notifications, or AI-generated insights. These are sticky notes.

screenshot.caption: The infinite canvas — pan, zoom, and drop notes wherever they feel right
Terminal theme — for the late-night notes session
Flat theme — quieter, for daytime work
Close-up of notes with markdown bodies and a link arrow between them
